title.purpose: Section headings, card titles, project names.

label.purpose: Tagline under hero name, editorial accent.

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Primary CTA. Transparent with Text-colored border outline.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-outline">get a copy of my resume</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: fit-content; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #CECDC3; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: #CECDC3; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { filter: brightness(0.75); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #DA702C; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Primary container. Base background with backdrop blur and Surface border.
components.html:
frontend ✨

Frontend development is my specialty.
components.css: .ds-card-glass { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; padding: 24px 32px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #282726; background: #1C1B1A; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); color: #CECDC3; } .ds-card-glass-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0; } .ds-card-glass-body { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.75; color: #6F6E6C; margin: 0; }

components.name: Paper Card
components.description: High-contrast container. Flexoki Paper background for light surfaces.
components.html:
brand design

I've designed 20+ logo and brand identities.
components.css: .ds-card-paper { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; padding: 24px 32px; border-radius: 12px; background: #FFFCF0; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); color: #100F0F; } .ds-card-paper-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0; color: #100F0F; } .ds-card-paper-body { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.75; margin: 0; color: #6F6E6C; }

components.name: Carousel Dot
components.css: .ds-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; background: #282726; cursor: pointer; padding: 0; transition: background-color 0.2s; } .ds-dot:hover { background: #343331; } .ds-dot[aria-current="true"] { background: #CECDC3; }

components.name: External Link
components.description: Inline external link with underline and external-link icon.
components.html: linkedin
components.css: .ds-link-ext { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #CECDC3; text-decoration: underline; } .ds-link-ext:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-link-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview: A personal portfolio that reads like a maker's wall: works pinned in progress, tools laid out, warm light over a dark room. The Studio Wall is confident in what it shows and warm in how it shows it. The system uses the Flexoki palette — a warm, ink-on-paper color system built for readability. The dark canvas is proper ink-black, with layered surfaces stepping through Flexoki's base-surface-overlay scale. Content sits on tinted glass panes that catch light through backdrop blur.
keyCharacteristics: Flexoki dark palette as the foundation — warm ink tones, not cold grays
Backdrop blur replaces shadow for depth
Scroll-reveal animations that feel physical, not decorative
Typography-led hierarchy with a sans-serif workhorse and serif accent
Color chosen from the Flexoki accent set for coherence

rules.name: The Flexoki Rule
rules.body: Every neutral on the site must be one of the seven Flexoki dark neutrals (Ink, Base, Surface, Overlay, Text, Subtle, Muted). No arbitrary grays. Accents must be drawn from the Flexoki chromatic set.

rules.name: The Glass-Over-Ink Rule
rules.body: Every surface is either tinted glass (Base background + backdrop-blur + Surface border) or Paper. No flat gray cards.

dos: Do use Flexoki dark neutrals for all grays. No Tailwind neutral scale colors.
Do use backdrop-blur and the Base/Surface/Overlay scale for depth.
Do draw accents from the Flexoki chromatic set (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Cyan, Blue, Purple, Magenta).
Do use the orange accent sparingly.
donts: Don't use arbitrary hex grays outside the Flexoki palette.
Don't animate layout properties. Transforms only.
Don't use card grids with identical icon + heading + text patterns.
